meaning: n.(破坏力极大的)巨型炸弹,一鸣惊人者
examples: She's scored again with her latest blockbuster.
Our new film will be a real blockbuster.
Nintendo and Sony need more blockbuster games.
One blockbuster from Pouletty would likely set off a wave of anti-addiction drug development.
The Disappearing Starlets 06.11.02 When it comes to the summer blockbuster, top female stars are personas non grata.
